message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.triu + numpy.kaiser passthrough wrappers (br-franken_numpy-u5ry, br-franken_numpy-xtfk)

Expose fnp_python.triu delegating to numpy.triu(m, k=0) (upper-triangular
extraction) and fnp_python.kaiser delegating to numpy.kaiser(M, beta)
(shape-parameterized window).

triu parity covers:
- square matrix with default k=0
- k offsets {-2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 5} on square matrix
- tall (4x3) and wide (2x5) rectangular matrices
- 3-D batch-of-matrices input
- float dtype preservation

kaiser parity covers:
- edge cases M in {0, 1, 2, 3, 8, 16, 33} at beta=5
- shape (M,) and dtype float64 parity
- beta=0 (rectangular) and beta=14 (high side-lobe suppression)
- window symmetry across the reversed index
